contents: Lemma nonneg_plus_le_compat_l x z : 0 ≤ z <-> x ≤ z + x.

0 ≤ z -> y = x + z -> x ≤ y

z * x ≤ z * x + z * a

contents: destruct (decompose_le Ez) as [a [Ea1 Ea2]], (decompose_le Exy) as [b [Eb1 Eb2]].

z * x = z * (x + b) + a * b

z * x + (z + a) * b = z * (x + b) + a * b
z * x + (z * b + a * b) = z * x + z * b + a * b

contents:
#[export] Instance plus_strong_cancel_l
    : forall z, StrongLeftCancellation (+) z.

goals.conclusion: forall z : R, StrongLeftCancellation plus z
forall z : R, StrongLeftCancellation plus z
(z + x < z + y) + (z + y < z + x)

contents:
#[export] Instance plus_strong_cancel_r
    : forall z, StrongRightCancellation (+) z.

goals.conclusion: forall z : R, StrongRightCancellation plus z
forall z : R, StrongRightCancellation plus z

contents: Lemma neg_mult_decompose x y : x * y < 0 -> (x < 0 /\ 0 < y) |_| (0 < x /\ y < 0).
assert (0 ≶ x) as Ex;[|assert (apart 0 y) as Ey].
apply apart_iff_total_lt in Ex;apply apart_iff_total_lt in Ey.
destruct Ex as [Ex|Ex], Ey as [Ey|Ey]; try auto.
Lemma pos_mult_decompose x y : 0 < x * y -> (0 < x /\ 0 < y) |_| (x < 0 /\ y < 0).
assert (0 ≶ x /\ apart 0 y) as [Ex Ey];[split|].
apply apart_iff_total_lt in Ex;apply apart_iff_total_lt in Ey.
destruct Ex as [Ex|Ex], Ey as [Ey|Ey]; try auto.

Lemma repeat_nat_nonneg : forall n, 0 <= Core.nat_iter n (plus 1) 0.

goals.conclusion:

0

≤ 1 +

contents: Lemma repeat_nat_pos : forall n, 0 < Core.nat_iter (S n) (plus 1) 0.

goals.conclusion:
forall n : nat,
0 <
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n.+1%nat

forall n : nat,
0 <
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n.+1%nat

0 <
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n.+1%nat

0 <
1 +
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n

0
≤ (fix F (m : nat) : R :=
     match m with
     | 0%nat => 0
     | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
     end)
    n

0
≤ (fix F (m : nat) : R :=
     match m with
     | 0%nat => 0
     | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
     end)
    n

forall n : nat,
Core.lt 0 n ->
(forall m : nat, n <> Core.nat_mul 0 m) <->
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n
≶ 0

(forall m : nat, n.+1%nat <> Core.nat_mul 0 m) ->
1 +
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n
≶ 0

1 +
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n
≶ 0 -> forall m : nat, n.+1%nat <> Core.nat_mul 0 m

(forall m : nat, n.+1%nat <> Core.nat_mul 0 m) ->
1 +
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n
≶ 0

1 +
(fix F (m : nat) : R := match m with
                        | 0%nat => 0
                        | m'.+1%nat => 1 + F m'
                        end)
  n
≶ 0 -> forall m : nat, n.+1%nat <> Core.nat_mul 0 m

contents:
apply (ap (fun n => match n with | S _ => Unit | _ => Empty end)) in E;
    simpl in E.

Context `{SemiRingOrder R} `{Apart R} `{!TrivialApart R}
    `{!NoZeroDivisors R} `{!TotalRelation (≤)} `{DecidablePaths R}.

Context `{Rlt : Lt R} `{is_mere_relation R lt}
    (lt_correct : forall x y, x < y <-> x ≤ y /\ x <> y).

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R, x < y <-> (x ≤ y) * (x <> y)
forall x y : R, x < y <-> (x ≤ y) * (x <> y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, ~ (y < x) -> {z : R & y = x + z}

(* If a morphism agrees on the positive cone then it is order preserving *)
Lemma preserving_preserves_nonneg : (forall x, 0 ≤ x -> 0 ≤ f x) -> OrderPreserving f.

Instance preserves_nonneg `{!OrderPreserving f} x
    : PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ f x).
Lemma preserves_nonpos `{!OrderPreserving f} x : x ≤ 0 -> f x ≤ 0.
Lemma preserves_ge_1 `{!OrderPreserving f} x : 1 ≤ x -> 1 ≤ f x.
Lemma preserves_le_1 `{!OrderPreserving f} x : x ≤ 1 -> f x ≤ 1.

Lemma strictly_preserving_preserves_pos
    : (forall x, 0 < x -> 0 < f x) -> StrictlyOrderPreserving f.

goals.conclusion: (forall x : R1, 0 < x -> 0 < f x) -> StrictlyOrderPreserving f
(forall x : R1, 0 < x -> 0 < f x) -> StrictlyOrderPreserving f

forall x0 : R1, 0 < x0 -> 0 < f x0

contents:
Instance preserves_pos `{!StrictlyOrderPreserving f} x
   : PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < f x).

Lemma preserves_neg `{!StrictlyOrderPreserving f} x
    : x < 0 -> f x < 0.

Lemma preserves_gt_1 `{!StrictlyOrderPreserving f} x
    : 1 < x -> 1 < f x.

Lemma preserves_lt_1 `{!StrictlyOrderPreserving f} x
    : x < 1 -> f x < 1.
